title: dir: sha512 support for skopeo copy
body:

comments.body: ✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6507**
@mtrmac PTA(nother)L . I think I have addressed all comments so far. Used Claude too, but hopefully no AI slop this time :crossed_fingers: . LMK.
@lsm5 looking at `digest-audit`, `manifestPath` and `signaturePath` need similar changes.
